tools.name: get_weather_forecast
tools.description: Fetch current weather from Open-Meteo (free, no API key). Use when the user gives a location as coordinates or after geocoding. Returns temperature (°C), humidity, and a WMO weather code for the current conditions.

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (e.g. 37.77 for San Francisco).

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (e.g. -122.42 for San Francisco).

tools.name: get_exchange_rates
tools.description: Fetch latest FX reference rates from Frankfurter (free, no API key, ECB-style blended rates). Use for comparing currencies in a deal or converting list prices. Pass ISO 4217 codes: base currency and a comma-separated quotes list (e.g. GBP,EUR,JPY).

base.description: Base currency code, e.g. USD or EUR.

quotes.description: Comma-separated quote currency codes, e.g. GBP,EUR,JPY (no spaces).
